description: Sync call logs, messages, extensions, contacts, and meetings from RingCentral cloud communications platform via the RingCentral REST API v1.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: The Client ID from your RingCentral Developer Portal app.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: The Client Secret from your RingCentral Developer Portal app.

install_fields.label: Server URL (default: https://platform.ringcentral.com)
install_fields.help: Use https://platform.ringcentral.com for production or https://platform.devtest.ringcentral.com for sandbox.
